examples: As a little boy, he'd seen a hobo come up to ask his mother for a piece of pie.
Which dog do you think is lazier, Hobo or Eddie?
Hobo is a smart dog and I'm sure he will come back soon.
Check out the gallery-like Hoxton Boutique (2 Hoxton Street), stocking MM6, Hussein Chalayan and its own Hobo label.
Say what you want about net neutrality, at least the Internet hasn't been taken out by a hobo.
